articles.title: Insurers have eliminated 11% of prior authorizations under reform pledge
articles.summary: Last summer, the insurance industry broadly agreed to reform a major healthcare pain point: prior authorization. Now, two of the industry's leading organizations are offering a look at progress toward those goals.

articles.title: Counsel Health expands primary AI care model to include lifestyle, chronic conditions
articles.summary: The artificial intelligence company will first focus on lifestyle conditions for the expansion, including chronic conditions throughout 2026.

articles.title: Waystar builds out AI solution to uncover lost provider revenue from payer 'take-backs'
articles.summary: Waystar developed an AI solution to help uncover lost provider revenue from payer payment 'take-backs.'

articles.title: Ambience Healthcare launches Chart Chat, an EHR-integrated AI copilot for nurses
articles.summary: Nurses using the tool during its pilot at Cleveland Clinic say it is “helping them build a richer, more confident understanding” of patients, Ambience Healthcare Head of Product Tanha Kabir told Fierce Healthcare.

articles.title: Anthropic acquires stealth AI startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal: reports
articles.summary: AI powerhouse Anthropic is continuing its push into the healthcare arena with the acquisition of previously stealth AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million stock deal, according to reporting from The Information and Eric Newcomer.

articles.title: Prior authorization: Today’s innovators speak out
articles.summary: Across the session, speakers returned to one idea: the challenge is not prior authorization alone, but the fragmented, manual experience surrounding it. Here’s what they had to say.

articles.title: Industry Voices—Hospitals are fueling AI innovation, should they own a piece of it?
articles.summary: As hospital workflows, clinician expertise and rich clinical data increasingly fuel the performance and market value of vendors’ AI tools, providers face a critical question: how can they share in that upside while protecting patients, preserving trust, and avoiding new forms of liability?

articles.title: STAT+: States looking to regulate use of chatbots
articles.summary: In this edition of STAT Health Tech: UnitedHealth Group's big bet on AI to transform its operations, venture funding trends, and more

articles.title: Opinion: STAT+: Former Geisinger CEO: U.S. health systems must replace huge numbers of people with AI
articles.summary: “Health care will become autonomous because the survival of health systems depends upon it,” writes former Geisinger CEO Glenn Steele.

articles.title: Insurers committed to cutting prior authorizations have eliminated 11% so far
articles.summary: Last summer, major payers committed to pare back onerous prior authorization policies, to the skepticism of providers. Now, AHIP and the Blue Cross Blue Shield Association are providing an update on insurers’ progress.

articles.title: Healthcare’s AI inflection point: The organizations that win will be the ones with the strongest data foundations
articles.summary: Healthcare doesn’t have an AI experimentation problem. It has an execution gap — and that gap is widening.

articles.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
articles.summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.

articles.title: Suno and major music labels reportedly clash over AI music sharing
articles.summary: The AI-powered musicmaker Suno is struggling to reach licensing deals with Universal Music Group and Sony Music Entertainment. That's according to a report from the Financial Times, which says both sides can't agree on whether users should be able to share the AI-generated songs they create. articles.title: Intel will help build Elon Musk’s Terafab AI chip factory
articles.summary: Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip project in Austin, Texas, is gaining a crucial new partner: Intel. On Tuesday, the American chipmaker announced it was signing on to help design and build the sprawling facility, which would supply AI chips to Musk's two companies, SpaceX (newly merged with xAI) and Tesla. articles.title: Gemini is making it faster for distressed users to reach mental health resources
articles.summary: Google says it has updated Gemini to better direct users to get mental health resources during moments of crisis. The change comes as the tech giant faces a wrongful death lawsuit alleging its chatbot "coached" a man to die by suicide, the latest in a string of lawsuits alleging tangible harm from AI products. articles.title: Suno is a music copyright nightmare
articles.summary: AI music platform Suno's policy is that it does not permit the use of copyrighted material. You can upload your own tracks to remix or set your original lyrics to AI-generated music. But, it's supposed to recognize and stop you from using other people's songs and lyrics.
